sentence: go to demoqa.com/automation-practice-form, fill in first name Vedant, last name Shah, email test@test.com, select the Sports hobby checkbox, and submit the form

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Practice Form Page - Fill Text Fields
workflow.description: Fill in the first name, last name, and email fields on the form.
triggers: If the current URL contains demoqa.com/automation-practice-form
If a text input with placeholder 'First Name' is visible
actions: Type 'Vedant' into the input with placeholder 'First Name'
Type 'Shah' into the input with placeholder 'Last Name'
Type 'test@test.com' into the input with placeholder 'name@example.com'

workflow.name: On Practice Form Page - Select Hobby
triggers: If the current URL contains demoqa.com/automation-practice-form
If a checkbox with label 'Sports' is visible

workflow.name: On Practice Form Page - Submit Form
workflow.description: Click the submit button to send the form data.
triggers: If the current URL contains demoqa.com/automation-practice-form
If a button with text 'Submit' is visible

workflow.name: Form Submitted Successfully
workflow.description: Verify that the form submission was successful by checking for the confirmation modal.
triggers: If a modal dialog with title 'Thanks for submitting the form' is visible
